7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_VARIABLEACCESSOR_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_VARIABLEACCESSOR_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Fri Nov 9 09:49:32 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Outil d'accession aux variables stock�es dans une base de donn�es VariableDataBase
17  *
18  * On acc�s indiff�rement aux variables sur maillage ou variable tableau
19  *
20  * Des accesseurs typ�s sont d�finis pour un meilleur contr�le � la compilation
21  *
22  * \code
23  * ScalarRealProperty Prop_1(0,"Prop_1");
24  * VectorialRealProperty Prop_2(1,"Prop_2",2);
25  *
26  * VariableManager variable_mng(mesh());
27  *
28  * variable_mng << variable<Cell>(Prop_1)
29  * << variable<Cell>(Prop_2)
30  *
31  * VariableAccessorT<Cell> accessor = variable_mng.variableAccessor<Cell>();
32  *
33  * VariableCellReal p_1(accessor.values(Prop_1));
34  * VariableCellArrayReal p_2(accessor.values(prop2));
35  * \endcode
36  *
37  */
38 
39 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/VariableRef.h"
40 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law2/VariableDataBase.h"
41 
42 #include <boost/fusion/include/for_each.hpp>
43 
44 #include <map>
45 
46 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
47 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
48 
49 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
50 
51 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
52 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
53 
54 /*
55  * \ingroup Law
56  * \brief Accesseur g�n�rique
57  *
58  */
59 class Accessor
60 {
61 public:
62 
63  typedef std::map<Property, VariableDataBase> DataBase;
64 
65 public:
66 
67  Accessor(const DataBase& properties,
68  Arcane::eItemKind kind = Arcane::IK_Unknown)
69  : m_properties(properties)
70  , m_kind(kind) {}
71 
73  bool contains(const Property& p) const { return m_properties.find(p) != m_properties.end(); }
74 
76  bool hasDerivatives(const Property& p) const { return _checkAndFind(p)->hasDerivatives(); }
77 
79  template<typename V, Dimension dim, typename T>
80  V& values(const PropertyT<dim,T>& p) const { return _checkAndFind(p)->template values<V>(); }
81 
83  template<typename V, Dimension dim, typename T>
84  V& derivatives(const PropertyT<dim,T>& p) const { return _checkAndFind(p)->template derivatives<V>(); }
85 
86  Arcane::SharedArray<Property> properties() const
87  {
88  Arcane::SharedArray<Property> props;
89  for(auto p : m_properties)
90  props.add(p.first);
91  return props;
92  }
93 
94 protected:
95 
96  std::shared_ptr<VariableRef> _checkAndFind(const Property& p) const
97  {
98  auto it = m_properties.find(p);
99  if(it == m_properties.end())
100  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(Arcane::String::format("Property '{0}' not registered",p.name()));
101 
102  return it->second.reference(m_kind, p.dataType());
103  }
104 
105  template<typename T>
106  T convertTo() const
107  {
108  return T(m_properties, m_kind);
109  }
110 
111 protected:
112 
114  const DataBase& m_properties;
115 
116 private:
117 
119  const Arcane::eItemKind m_kind;
120 };
121 
122 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
123 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
124 
125 #define ACCESSORS(...) \
126  template<Dimension dim, typename T> \
127  typename __VA_ARGS__::ValueType& values(const PropertyT<dim,T>& p) const \
128  { \
129  return Accessor::values<typename __VA_ARGS__::ValueType>(p); \
130  } \
131  \
132  template<Dimension dim, typename T> \
133  typename __VA_ARGS__::DerivType& derivatives(const PropertyT<dim,T>& p) const \
134  { \
135  return Accessor::derivatives<typename __VA_ARGS__::DerivType>(p); \
136  } \
137  \
138  template<Dimension dim, typename T> \
139  Arcane::SharedArray<typename __VA_ARGS__::ValueType> values(const Arcane::Array<PropertyT<dim,T>>& p) const \
140  { \
141  Arcane::SharedArray<typename __VA_ARGS__::ValueType> variables; \
142  for(auto ps : p) { \
143  variables.add(values(ps)); \
144  } \
145  return variables; \
146  } \
147  \
148  template<Dimension dim, typename T> \
149  Arcane::SharedArray<typename __VA_ARGS__::DerivType> derivatives(const Arcane::Array<PropertyT<dim,T>>& p) const \
150  { \
151  Arcane::SharedArray<typename __VA_ARGS__::DerivType> variables; \
152  for(auto ps : p) { \
153  variables.add(derivatives(ps)); \
154  } \
155  return variables; \
156  }
157 
158 /*
159  * \ingroup Law
160  * \brief Accesseur statique pour les variables sur maillages
161  *
162  */
163 struct VariableAccessor : public Accessor
164 {
165  VariableAccessor(const DataBase& properties,
166  Arcane::eItemKind kind)
167  : Accessor(properties, kind) {}
168 
169  ACCESSORS(GenericVariableContainer<PropertyT<dim,T>>);
170 };
171 
172 template<typename K>
173 struct VariableAccessorT : public VariableAccessor
174 {
175  VariableAccessorT(const DataBase& properties)
176  : VariableAccessor(properties, Arcane::ItemTraitsT<K>::kind()) {}
177 
178  ACCESSORS(VariableContainer<PropertyT<dim,T>,K>);
179 };
180 
181 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
182 
183 /*
184  * \ingroup Law
185  * \brief Accesseur statique pour les variables partielles sur maillages
186  *
187  */
188 
189 struct PartialVariableAccessor : public Accessor
190 {
191  PartialVariableAccessor(const Accessor::DataBase& properties,
192  Arcane::eItemKind kind)
193  : Accessor(properties, kind) {}
194 
195  ACCESSORS(GenericPartialVariableContainer<PropertyT<dim,T>>);
196 };
197 
198 template<typename K>
199 struct PartialVariableAccessorT : public PartialVariableAccessor
200 {
201  PartialVariableAccessorT(const Accessor::DataBase& properties)
202  : PartialVariableAccessor(properties, Arcane::ItemTraitsT<K>::kind()) {}
203 
204  ACCESSORS(PartialVariableContainer<PropertyT<dim,T>,K>);
205 };
206 
207 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
208 
209 /*
210  * \ingroup Law
211  * \brief Accesseur statique pour les variables tableaux
212  *
213  */
214 struct ArrayAccessor : public Accessor
215 {
216  ArrayAccessor(const Accessor::DataBase& properties)
217  : Accessor(properties) {}
218 
219  ACCESSORS(ArrayContainer<PropertyT<dim,T>>);
220 
221  void resize(Integer size) const
222  {
223  {
225  for(auto p : m_properties) {
226  for(auto pp : p.second) {
227  pp->resize(size);
228  }
229  }
230  }
231  }
232 };
233 
234 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
235 
236 /*
237  * \ingroup Law
238  * \brief Accesseur statique pour les variables scalaires
239  *
240  */
241 struct ScalarAccessor : public Accessor
242 {
243  ScalarAccessor(const Accessor::DataBase& properties)
244  : Accessor(properties) {}
245 
246  ACCESSORS(ScalarContainer<PropertyT<dim,T>>);
247 };
248 
249 #undef ACCESSORS
250 
251 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
252 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
253 
254 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
255 
256 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
257 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
258 
259 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_VARIABLEMANAGER_H */
